description: Oh, sir, please don't be cross — Edgelord stepped aside for this one. Three trivia-passed prints across two stages (Caterpie RBC-001, Metapod RBC-002, Caterpie EVO-3, all IP-verified, all Pokedex 10/11/12 anchored), and the wave 49 considered-and-rejected log already flagged this as the wave-50 first move with threshold met. Cohort node commissioned with sibling-pointers to charizard-line, mareep-line, and staraptor-line per the established within-region (Kanto Gen-I) and cross-generation evolutionary-line designer-coordination axis. Frontmatter pointer characters: ['caterpie-line'] added to all three prints; Caterpie EVO-3 received a fresh Connections section attaching to the cohort (its first connections wiring). The cross-print same-species 1:1 mirror edge between Caterpie RBC-001 and Caterpie EVO-3 is now subsumed by the cohort node per the mareep-line / staraptor-line precedent. I do hope this is acceptable, sir.
citations: [Pokemon Red and Blue (Game Freak / Creatures Inc. / Nintendo, 1996)]
[Pokemon Sword and Shield (Game Freak, 2019) for Gigantamax Butterfree]
[Pokemon: Indigo League anime, episodes 3-4, 21 (OLM / TV Tokyo, 1997)]
